title: EndpointType visit_str visitor eliminates double-alloc and is correct serde idiom
description: EndpointType Deserialize was rewritten to use a Visitor with visit_str() instead of deserializing to String then matching. A contributor might suggest reverting to the simpler String::deserialize approach. The visitor is correct: (1) for recognized variants (Vtc, Payment, Blob, etc.) no String allocation occurs at all — visit_str receives a borrowed &str; (2) only the Other(s) branch allocates, and only for unknown variants; (3) this is the standard serde idiom for string-based enums with fallback variants (used throughout serde_json and similar crates). Do not revert to String::deserialize.
close_reason: Decision record: current implementation is correct; no code change needed
